common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?

dashboard.title: Budget Manager
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your budgets and track spending by category
dashboard.noBudgetsDesc: Create your first budget to get started

template.title: Select Template
template.description: Choose a budget template to organize your categories by your lifestyle

tax.title: Tax Configuration
tax.description: Select your country and applicable tax to include in budget calculations
tax.noTaxes: No taxes available for this country

cookies.title: Cookie Preferences
cookies.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience. You can customize your preferences or accept all cookies.
cookies.necessaryDesc: Required for the website to function properly. Cannot be disabled.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how you use the website.

manager.title: Cookie Manager
manager.description: Manage your cookie preferences and review what data is stored.
manager.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to clear all cookies?

page.title: Budget Templates
page.noTemplatesDesc: Create your first custom template using the wizard or advanced editor

wizard.title: Template Wizard
wizard.selectCategoriesDesc: Choose the categories you want to include in your template
wizard.readyToCreate: Your template is ready to create!

automation.title: Template Automation
automation.description: Set up automated rules to streamline your budget management
automation.smartCategorizeDesc: Automatically categorize transactions based on description and history
automation.budgetAlertDesc: Get notified when spending approaches category limits
automation.recurringDesc: Detect and track recurring transactions automatically

footer.pioneerMessage: This is a pioneering project in budget management. Any support or contribution to help its development would be greatly appreciated. Thank you for being part of this journey!
footer.supportMessage: Help keep this project alive and growing

professional.title: Create Professional Budget
professional.description: Create a detailed budget with line items, subtotals, and tax calculations

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.collectionDesc: We collect minimal information necessary to provide our service. This includes budget data, categories, and transactions you create. All data is stored locally on your device and our servers.
privacy.usageDesc: Your data is used solely to provide budget tracking functionality. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties.
privacy.securityDesc: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption and secure connections.
privacy.rightsDesc: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your data at any time. Contact us for data-related requests.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceDesc: By using this application, you agree to these terms. If you disagree, please do not use the service.
terms.licenseDesc: We grant you a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use this application for personal budget management.
terms.restrictionsDesc: You may not reverse engineer, redistribute, or use this application for illegal purposes.
terms.liabilityDesc: This application is provided as-is. We are not liable for any damages arising from its use.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.whatDesc: Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us improve your experience.
cookies.typesDesc: We use necessary cookies for functionality, functional cookies for preferences, and analytics cookies to understand usage patterns.
cookies.manageDesc: You can manage cookie preferences through our cookie consent banner or your browser settings.

downloads.title: Download App
downloads.description: Download our app for your platform
